message:
test(proptest): add 18 property tests for Phase 3 hostcall modules (bd-3ar8v.4.45)

Add proptest-based property tests to three Phase 3 modules:
- hostcall_s3_fifo: 7 tests (queue disjointness, capacity bounds, counter monotonicity, owner counts, tier map consistency)
- hostcall_io_uring_lane: 6 tests (force-compat guarantee, disabled-never-io_uring, precondition completeness, telemetry consistency, determinism)
- hostcall_rewrite: 5 tests (selected cost <= baseline, non-negative delta, delta arithmetic, disabled-returns-baseline, determinism)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
